LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 6, 2008 PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077 (301/HEK)

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY THE OPPOSITION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: PAULA SHI, CSR# 13358
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: RUCH, TONY SUBSTITUTED FOR TORRES, FRANCISCO G. AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
